notes: Pure power conditioner/voltage regulator — no signal I/O (no HDMI, SDI, audio, network, etc.). Accepts 97–137 VAC input, regulates to 120V ±5V output. 15A capacity. Features SMP (Series Multi-Stage Protection), LiFT (Linear Filtering Technology), and EVS (Extreme Voltage Shutdown). The power inlet is a captive cord (not a detachable IEC C13/C14 inlet), confirmed by multiple sources describing a "captive 10 ft cord with NEMA 15 plug." USB-A port type inferred from product context (standard USB-A charger); spec sheets do not explicitly state USB-A vs. USB-C. BNC is confirmed rear panel, 12VAC output for rack lamp duty only.

ports.name: AC Outlet 1–8 (Rear)
ports.note: 8 regulated, spike-suppressed, RFI-filtered rear panel outlets; three widely spaced to accommodate bulky AC transformers

ports.name: AC In
ports.note: Captive 10 ft 14 AWG cord with NEMA 5-15 plug; not a detachable IEC inlet

ports.name: Rear Rack Lamp
ports.note: 12VAC 500mA max; powers standard gooseneck rack lamp (lamp not included)

ports.name: USB Charger (Front)
ports.note: Front panel USB-A convenience port for charging media devices or powering a USB lamp; charging current not specified in sources
